title: MemoryWritten payload
description: Emitted when a new auto-memory entry is filed via forge(schema_name='memory', ...). Carries the create-time field values + the resolved vault path + a body-length measure. Consumed by the arc-close-filing-review telemetry pipeline (counts memory writes per session for filing-precision tracking) and the future trained-arc-close-filing-classifier corpus per docs/MEMORY_SUBSTRATE.md §7. The memory entry's entity reference (and project_id) lives in the envelope.

name.description: Kebab-case slug — same as the filename (`<name>.md`) and the frontmatter `name:` field.

kind.description: Closed taxonomy per docs/MEMORY_SUBSTRATE.md §1. Drives the vault subdir (memory/<kind>/<name>.md). user = about the user (cross-project semantics); feedback = guidance from corrections + confirmations; project = ongoing work / decisions / incidents; reference = pointers to external systems.

description.description: One-line description from the entry's frontmatter. Used by MEMORY.md index rebuilds (T3) and surfaced in parse_context candidate listings.

source.description: Provenance — e.g. `arc-close-filing-review` (substrate-side fire via the Stop hook), `manual` (user-authored via direct forge call), `migration` (T4's one-shot harness-dir migration). Optional; absent for entries written without a provenance tag.

observed_first.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the pattern first surfaced. Optional. Used by the future recurrence-merging path.

vault_path.description: Absolute path of the entry on disk. Resolved at write time from the schema's filename_pattern; lets downstream consumers verify the entry without re-deriving the path.

body_length_bytes.description: Byte length of the body field (markdown, frontmatter excluded). Lets the telemetry pipeline filter trivial/empty entries without re-reading the file.
